title: Krypto is in trouble in the new Supergirl trailer and he had better be OK
author: Gail Sherman
summary:
Kara Zor-El, AKA Supergirl, was not raised on a farm in Kansas by a loving family. She watched the destruction of her home planet, Krypton, and was sent to Earth to protect her baby cousin, who was already grown up and doing fine by the time she arrived. — Read the rest

The post
full_text:
Kara Zor-El, AKA Supergirl, was not raised on a farm in Kansas by a loving family. She watched the destruction of her home planet, Krypton, and was sent to Earth to protect her baby cousin, who was already grown up and doing fine by the time she arrived. She travels to worlds with red suns so she can get drunk. She is kind of a mess. But she loves her dog, Krypto. Krypto is a bit of a terror, as Superman found out while dog sitting him in Superman 2025.

In the newly released trailer, Krypto and Kara do everything together, including crowd surfing, but Krypto gets poisoned by a baddie, and Kara has 72 hours to get the antidote and save him. "There is no home without you, buddy," she says in flashback to an adorable puppy-sized Krypto. I swear to all that is good and holy that if anything happens to Krypto, I will lose my mind. My desire not to be spoiled is preventing me from checking Does the Dog Die? or reading Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow, the series on which the new movie will be based.
